description: Primary source URL returns 404 or has moved permanently
required_reviewer_action: Re-fetch live; capture fresh Wayback if available; locate replacement URL
blocks_runtime_if_confirmed: YES if no replacement URL found
notes: Most common issue type; Wayback fallback critical

description: Audience eligibility (LCME/AOA/IMG/Caribbean/intl) on the card does not match source
required_reviewer_action: Re-read source; compare verbatim audience language; update audience_detail and restriction_tags
notes: High-trust risk if false; senior reviewer recommended

description: Visa policy on the card (J-1/H-1B/B-1/B-2) does not match source
required_reviewer_action: Re-read source visa-related sections; never overclaim sponsorship; preserve silence if source silent
notes: If source is silent on J-1 or H-1B the card MUST also remain silent

required_reviewer_action: Re-read source fee section; verify exact dollar amount
notes: Common between application cycles when fees update

description: Application method (VSLO/email/PDF) does not match source
notes: Wrong application method blocks user effort

description: Institution has discontinued the visiting student program entirely
required_reviewer_action: Re-fetch live; check institution news/announcements; senior review
notes: Senior reviewer dual sign-off required for delist

description: The same opportunity is listed twice (e.g. system page + site-specific page) and confuses users
required_reviewer_action: Compare both listings; merge or de-list duplicate
notes: Lincoln EM site-specific vs MOSAIC system-level is one current example

description: The card's institution_name does not match the source organization
Card content has not been re-reviewed in 90+ days and source has changed
required_reviewer_action: Re-fetch live; update last_reviewed_at if no material change

description: Card makes a claim (e.g. specialty list) that the source does not actually support
required_reviewer_action: Re-read source carefully; remove or scope the unsupported claim
notes: High-trust risk; closely related to eligibility_incorrect

required_reviewer_action: Triage and reclassify if possible; otherwise close as unactionable
notes: Catch-all to ensure no submission is silently dropped
